Properties.Contents: <?xpacket begin="﻿" id="W5M0MpCehiHzreSzNTczkc9d"?> <x:xmpmeta xmlns:x="adobe:ns:meta/" x:xmptk="Adobe XMP Core 5.0-c060 61.134777, 2010/02/12-17:32:00 "> <rdf:RDF xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"> <rdf:Description rdf:about="" xmlns:xmp="http://ns.adobe.com/xap/1.0/"> <xmp:CreateDate>2019-02-13T16:47:43-05:00</xmp:CreateDate> <xmp:MetadataDate>2019-02-13T16:47:43-05:00</xmp:MetadataDate> <xmp:ModifyDate>2019-02-13T16:47:43-05:00</xmp:ModifyDate> <xmp:CreatorTool>Adobe InCopy 7.0</xmp:CreatorTool> </rdf:Description> <rdf:Description rdf:about="" xmlns:xmpMM="http://ns.adobe.com/xap/1.0/mm/" xmlns:stEvt="http://ns.adobe.com/xap/1.0/sType/ResourceEvent#"> <xmpMM:InstanceID>xmp.iid:E7486EF8132068118083EC1C457991F8</xmpMM:InstanceID> <xmpMM:DocumentID>xmp.did:E7486EF8132068118083EC1C457991F8</xmpMM:DocumentID> <xmpMM:OriginalDocumentID>xmp.did:E7486EF8132068118083EC1C457991F8</xmpMM:OriginalDocumentID> <xmpMM:History> <rdf:Seq> <rdf:li rdf:parseType="Resource"> <stEvt:action>created</stEvt:action> <stEvt:instanceID>xmp.iid:E7486EF8132068118083EC1C457991F8</stEvt:instanceID> <stEvt:when>2019-02-13T16:47:43-05:00</stEvt:when> <stEvt:softwareAgent>Adobe InDesign 7.0</stEvt:softwareAgent> </rdf:li> <rdf:li rdf:parseType="Resource"> <stEvt:action>converted</stEvt:action> <stEvt:parameters>from application/x-incopy to application/x-indesign</stEvt:parameters> </rdf:li> <rdf:li rdf:parseType="Resource"> <stEvt:action>converted</stEvt:action> <stEvt:parameters>from application/x-incopy to application/x-indesign</stEvt:parameters> </rdf:li> </rdf:Seq> </xmpMM:History> </rdf:Description> <rdf:Description rdf:about="" xmlns:dc="http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/"> <dc:format>application/x-incopy</dc:format> <dc:title> <rdf:Alt> <rdf:li xml:lang="x-default">body</rdf:li> </rdf:Alt> </dc:title> </rdf:Description> </rdf:RDF> </x:xmpmeta> <?xpacket end="r"?>
